conflict_type: Conflicts between Keyword Constraints and Phrase Constraints
seed_instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting.
org_constraint: The phrase "thank you for the opportunity" must appear at least twice in the email.
new_constraint: The keyword 'opportunity' must appear only in its plural form ('opportunities') in the email and must appear at least once.
instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The phrase "thank you for the opportunity" must appear at least twice in the email. The keyword 'opportunity' must appear only in its plural form ('opportunities') in the email and must appear at least once.
response:
Subject: Resignation - [Your Name]

Dear [Boss's Name],

Please accept this email as formal notification that I am resigning from my position as [Your Job Title] at [Company Name]. My last day of employment will be [Your Last Date].

I want to express my sincere gratitude for the time I have spent with the team. Thank you for the opportunity to grow professionally and contribute to such meaningful projects. I have truly valued the various opportunities I was given to develop my skills and collaborate with such talented colleagues.

Thank you for the opportunity to be a part of this organization. I wish you and the company nothing but continued success in the future.

Please let me know how I can best assist during this transition period to ensure a smooth handover of my current responsibilities.

Best regards,

[Your Name]<turn|>
